title: Murphy Beds & Custom Storage
heroAlt: Custom Murphy bed with integrated wardrobe and storage cabinetry in Darlinghurst, Sydney
metaTitle: Murphy Beds Sydney | Custom Murphy Bed & Storage Joinery | InsideOut Joinery
metaDescription: Custom Murphy beds with integrated wardrobe and storage cabinetry across Sydney. Queen and king size, designed around your room so the bed folds away cleanly and the room works every day.
intro: A Murphy bed done properly is not a novelty — it is a serious piece of joinery that makes a room perform two jobs without looking like either one is compromised. We design and build custom Murphy beds with integrated wardrobe and storage cabinetry so that when the bed is packed away, the room reads as a resolved, finished space. When it is down, it works like a proper bedroom. The joinery around it is what makes that possible.
includedTitle: Murphy bed and storage joinery we build
included: Queen and king size Murphy beds built to suit the wall and ceiling height of the room
Integrated wardrobe and storage cabinetry along the top and both sides of the Murphy bed frame
Matching joinery finish throughout so the unit reads as a single resolved wall rather than separate pieces
Built-in shelving, display and closed storage designed around how the room is used day to day
Hallway, entry and utility storage joinery that improves circulation and keeps high-traffic areas clear
Storage joinery that carries the same finish and profile as the wider home fitout

featureBlocks.title: The joinery around the bed is what makes it work
featureBlocks.text: A Murphy bed on its own is a mechanism. Custom cabinetry built around it — wardrobe panels along the sides, overhead storage above, matching door fronts — is what makes the room feel intentional rather than improvised. We design the full wall as one scope so the proportions, finish and hardware all work together.

featureBlocks.title: Queen size, built to the room
featureBlocks.text: We build queen size Murphy beds as the standard — sized to the actual wall height and ceiling rather than a catalogue dimension. The bed frame, mattress clearance and surrounding cabinetry are all planned together from the start so nothing is an afterthought.

featureBlocks.title: A room that does more than one job
featureBlocks.text: Murphy beds are most valuable in Sydney apartments and compact homes where a spare room, study or living space needs to also sleep guests without being dedicated to it full time. When the joinery is right, the transition between modes is easy and the room does not look like either use is being sacrificed.

materialsTitle: Finishes and materials we work with
materials: Timber-look and warm laminate finishes — including Polytec Chifley (Boston Oak) as used in the Darlinghurst fitout
Painted polyurethane for a cleaner, quieter built-in look that sits against walls and ceilings without visual weight
Two-tone layouts combining open shelving, closed cabinetry and wardrobe sections within the same wall
Hardware and soft-close mechanisms matched to the wider joinery spec throughout the home

beforeAfter.title: Before & after
beforeAfter.text: The Darlinghurst Murphy bed fitout shows what is possible in a compact inner-city room. A queen size bed with custom wardrobe and storage cabinetry on both sides and above, finished in Boston Oak Polytec Chifley throughout — so the room works as a study, guest room or bedroom depending on the day.
beforeAfter.beforeAlt: Darlinghurst room before Murphy bed and custom storage joinery installation
beforeAfter.afterAlt: Darlinghurst custom Murphy bed with integrated wardrobe and storage cabinetry in Boston Oak

faqs.question: What size Murphy beds do you build?
faqs.answer: Queen size is our standard build. We size the bed, frame and surrounding cabinetry to the actual wall and ceiling height of the room so everything is proportioned properly — not trimmed to fit a catalogue spec.

faqs.question: Can storage and wardrobe joinery be built into the same wall as the Murphy bed?
faqs.answer: Yes — that is the most common scope we do. Wardrobe panels along the sides, overhead storage above, and closed cabinetry integrated into the unit so the whole wall reads as one resolved piece of joinery.

faqs.question: Do Murphy beds work in apartments?
faqs.answer: Yes, and that is usually where they make the most sense. Sydney apartments that need a guest room without dedicating a full room to it are exactly the right application. When the joinery is designed properly the room does not look like a Murphy bed room — it looks like a study or living space that also happens to sleep guests comfortably.

faqs.question: Can the Murphy bed joinery match the rest of the home fitout?
faqs.answer: Yes. When the Murphy bed is part of a broader renovation or joinery scope we carry the same finish, profile and hardware direction across every room so the result feels cohesive, not like individual pieces bought separately.

faqs.question: Do you also build general storage and shelving?
faqs.answer: Yes. Built-in shelving, book walls, hallway storage, utility cupboards and display joinery are a regular part of what we build — often alongside a kitchen, wardrobe or renovation scope.

ctaTitle: Need a Murphy bed or custom storage joinery?
ctaText: Send through the room dimensions, a photo of the wall and a rough idea of what you need the space to do. We can work out a scope that makes the room pull double duty without looking like it.
